Compliance.description: POPIA policy on website; registered SA dealer; 6-month CPA warranty standard; no negative regulatory news found.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 4.94/5 (117 reviews, 95%+ 5-star recent 2026); Google 4.6/5 consistent; wide praise for professionalism/service.

Product Value.description: Competitive pre-owned pricing; 6-mo warranty; wide range with finance options. Strong value for money.

Innovation.description: Modern website, social presence, online listings; no app or significant digital innovation found.

Customer Support.description: Highly praised in reviews for fast responses, professional follow-up, after-sales support; no negative support issues found.

Accessibility & Security.description: Website with POPIA policy; standard digital presence; no app. National delivery offered. No security incidents noted.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Pre-owned from R150k (economy) to R600k+ (SUVs); competitive for Gauteng market

socialSentiment.summary: HelloPeter/Google: highly positive; no significant negatives; minimal X data.
